description: Bugfix cycle 1 for Milestone 18 — Rename Idea to Project. Fixes 1 defect found in QA review: process step labels and user-facing strings still display old 'Brainstorm'/'idea' terminology instead of 'Define'/'project'.

userStories.title: Fix: Process step labels and user-facing strings still display old terminology
userStories.description: Fix defect DEF-001 from QA report qa-m18-rename-project.md. Multiple user-facing strings in ProcessStepper, ProjectWorkspace, and DocumentView still show 'Brainstorm'/'idea' terminology. Translation keys are missing from en.json and de.json.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json: Add 'process' section with keys: brainstorm='Define', brainstormDesc='Chat with AI to define your project', document='Structure', documentDesc='Generate & refine your requirements document', review='Review', reviewDesc='Submit for approval', stepper='Process steps', brainstormDoneHint='Ready to formalize your project? Continue to generate your Business Requirements Document.'
frontend/src/i18n/locales/de.json: Add equivalent 'process' section with German translations (Definieren, Strukturieren, Uberprufung, etc.)
frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json: Add review.rejectedHint='Your project was rejected. You can refine it and resubmit.' and review.backToBrainstorm='Back to Define'
frontend/src/i18n/locales/de.json: Add equivalent review.rejectedHint and review.backToBrainstorm in German
frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json: Add submit.readyDescription='Once submitted, your project will be sent to reviewers for evaluation.'
frontend/src/i18n/locales/de.json: Add equivalent submit.readyDescription in German

frontend/src/components/workspace/ProcessStepper.tsx: Update fallback strings — 'Brainstorm' -> 'Define', 'Document' -> 'Structure', 'Chat with AI to shape your idea' -> 'Chat with AI to define your project'

frontend/src/pages/ProjectWorkspace/index.tsx line ~256: Replace hardcoded 'Send at least one message in the brainstorming chat before proceeding to the document.' with t() call using correct terminology
frontend/src/pages/ProjectWorkspace/index.tsx line ~260: Replace hardcoded 'Submit your idea for review first.' with t() call or update text to 'Submit your project for review first.'
All user-facing strings in ProcessStepper, ProjectWorkspace, and DocumentView use 'project' not 'idea' and 'Define'/'Structure' not 'Brainstorm'/'Document'
grep -r 'your idea' frontend/src/ --include='*.tsx' --exclude-dir=__tests__ returns zero hits
grep -r 'brainstorming' frontend/src/ --include='*.tsx' --exclude-dir=__tests__ returns zero hits (excluding comments)
userStories.notes: Defect: DEF-001. Files: frontend/src/components/workspace/ProcessStepper.tsx:37-42, frontend/src/pages/ProjectWorkspace/index.tsx:256,260,462,512,520, frontend/src/components/workspace/DocumentView.tsx:445, frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json, frontend/src/i18n/locales/de.json. Expected: Process step labels 'Define'/'Structure'/'Review' and all strings use 'project' not 'idea'. Actual: Fallback strings display 'Brainstorm'/'Document' and 'your idea'. Translation keys (process.*, review.rejectedHint, review.backToBrainstorm, submit.readyDescription) do not exist in en.json/de.json. Suggested fix: Add all missing translation keys to both locale files, update fallback strings in components as safety net, replace hardcoded strings with t() calls.

## Summary
Milestone 18 renames the core "Idea" entity to "Project" across the entire codebase — database, backend models, API routes, frontend code, and all user-facing text. The implementation is thorough across database migrations, model classes, proto files, gRPC layer, API routes, and
